text:

Marcin <hybridx87@gmail.com> wrote:
>  
>  Multiple playback streams only work with;
>  
>  kenv hint.pcm.0.dac="1"
>  

Good enough. Please unset that variable (kenv -u ..) , grab

http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/test/maestro3.c

It should work out of the box provided that vchan is enabled. I'll
commit / fix this sooner.


--
Ariff Abdullah
FreeBSD
